<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Bīng-sáe̤k]][[de:Feuer-Hund]][[fr:Chien de feu]][[hak:Piáng-sut]][[ja:丙戌]][[ko:병술]][[nds:Füür-Hund]][[vi:Bính Tuất]][[za:Bingjswt]][[zh-min-nan:Péng-sut]][[zh-yue:丙戌]][[zh:丙戌]]

'''Yang Fire Dog also known as 丙戌''' (hinoe inu, heikano inu, heijutsu) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 23rd combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yin Wood Rooster]] and the following combination is [[Yin Fire Pig]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Hinoe (丙)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], and they interact by [[Aioi|Mutual Generation]] (Fire produces Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Dog (丙戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 seot1
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-inu
***Onyomi 1: heiju
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongsul (병술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Tuất

==Years of Yang Fire Dog==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 26 when divided by 60 is a year of Bingu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Bingu'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 26|26 AD]]
* [[AD 86|86 AD]]
* [[AD 146|146 AD]]
* [[206|206 AD]]
* [[266|266 AD]]
* [[326|326 AD]]
* [[386|386 AD]]
* [[446|446 AD]]
* [[506|506 AD]]
* [[566|566 AD]]
* [[626|626 AD]]
* [[686|686 AD]]
* [[746|746 AD]]
* [[806|806 AD]]
* [[866|866 AD]]
* [[926|926 AD]]
* [[986|986 AD]]
|
* [[1046|1046 AD]]
* [[1106|1106 AD]]
* [[1166|1166 AD]]
* [[1226|1226 AD]]
* [[1286|1286 AD]]
* [[1346|1346 AD]]
* [[1406|1406 AD]]
* [[1466|1466 AD]]
* [[1526|1526 AD]]
* [[1586|1586 AD]]
* [[1646|1646 AD]]
* [[1706|1706 AD]]
* [[1766|1766 AD]]
* [[1826|1826 AD]]
* [[1886|1886 AD]]
* [[1946|1946 AD]]
|
* [[2006|2006 AD]]
* [[2066 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2126 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2186 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2246 AD]]
* [[24th century|2306 AD]]
* [[2366 AD]]
* [[2426 AD]]
* [[2486 AD]]
* [[2546 AD]]
* [[2606 AD]]
* [[2666 AD]]
* [[2726 AD]]
* [[2786 AD]]
* [[2846 AD]]
* [[2906 AD]]
* [[2966 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Dog==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are either [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[September]] becomes the month of Bingu. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Dog==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Bingu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Bingu day is the 3rd day of [[Ten directions]].
== See Also ==
{{wikidata link|Q1062512}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
